name: Turk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S.
summary: T√É¬ºrk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S. engages in the production, marketing, sale, and distribution of beer and malt in Turkey and internationally. The company offers its products under the Tuborg, Carlsberg, SKOL, FREDERIK, Venus, and Troy brands, as well as imports SOL, Weihenstephan, GUINNESS, Kronenbourg 1664 Blanc, KILKENNY, Grimbergen, and DESPERADOS branded products. It also provides soft drinks. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries, such as England, Canada, Germany, Iraq, and the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus. The company was founded in 1967 and is based in Izmir, Turkey. T√É¬ºrk Tuborg Bira ve Malt Sanayii A.S. is a subsidiary of International Beer Breweries Ltd.
